title: cerefolium nitidum
intro: Cerefolium nitidum, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of cerefolium nitidum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Cerefolium nitidum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
